title: Overtaking-enabled Eco-approach Control at Signalized Intersections for Connected and Automated Vehicles
authors: Haoxuan Dong; Weichao Zhuang; Guoyuan Wu; Zhaojian Li; Guodong Yin; Ziyou Song
method_family: Overtaking-enabled two-stage eco-approach / 允许超车的两阶段生态接近控制
concepts: 把信号控制替换为车辆级调度与控制。
减少急加减速、停车和能耗峰值。
把碰撞风险写成距离、时间间隔或屏障函数。
允许超车的两阶段生态接近控制

section_map.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_map.zh: 定位问题背景、研究缺口和为什么现有保守/非协同方法不足。
section_map.en: Frames the motivation, research gap, and limits of conservative or non-cooperative methods.

section_map.heading: II. INTERSECTIONCROSSINGSCENARIO AND
section_map.zh: 作为局部论证段落阅读，关注它如何服务主问题。
section_map.en: Read as a local argument and ask how it supports the main question.

section_map.heading: III. PROBLEMFORMULATION ANDCONTROLFRAMEWORK
section_map.zh: 把交通交互转写为状态、约束、目标或图结构，是精读时最应复现的部分。
section_map.en: Defines states, constraints, objectives, or graph structures; this is the section to reproduce carefully.

section_map.heading: IV. OVERTAKING-ENABLEDECO-APPROACH
section_map.zh: 作为局部论证段落阅读，关注它如何服务主问题。
section_map.en: Read as a local argument and ask how it supports the main question.

section_map.heading: V. SIMULATION ANDRESULTS
section_map.zh: 检验方法是否真的改善效率、安全或能耗；要关注基准是否公平。
section_map.en: Tests efficiency, safety, or energy claims; inspect whether baselines are fair.

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Eco-approach + relaxed FIFO”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Eco-approach + relaxed FIFO. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Signalized intersection and overtaking/lane planning assumptions are outside the current fixed-route JSSP scope.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 在信号交叉口中，放松 FIFO 队列并允许超车，能否同时降低能耗和延误？
overview.core_question_en: Can relaxing FIFO with overtaking-enabled lane optimization reduce both energy use and delay at signalized intersections?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Receding-horizon two-stage control: dynamic-programming lane optimization followed by PMP speed trajectory optimization.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Handles dynamic disturbance from preceding vehicles and lane-choice constraints.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Relaxes FIFO queuing at signalized intersections to reduce driving cost, energy consumption, and delay.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：较强工程洞察：明确挑战 FIFO 保守性，对 JSSP 重排序动机非常有用。

methodology.model_name: 车道 DP 与速度 PMP 的两阶段目标 / Two-stage lane-DP and speed-PMP objective
symbols: 第 k 步车道选择
包含能耗、时间和平滑性
methodology.algorithm_zh: 第一阶段用动态规划选择车道和超车策略，打破传统 FIFO；第二阶段用 PMP/最优控制生成速度曲线。滚动时域使策略能对前车扰动重新规划。
methodology.algorithm_en: A receding-horizon controller first solves lane/overtaking choices with dynamic programming and then optimizes the speed profile with optimal-control tools.
methodology.stability_zh: 两阶段设计把组合车道决策和连续速度控制分开，实时性较好；但阶段间耦合不足时，车道选择可能导致后续速度优化不可行。
methodology.stability_en: The decomposition improves tractability, but lane decisions can create downstream feasibility issues if speed constraints are not anticipated.
assumptions: 车辆具备安全超车和变道能力。
信号相位和前车扰动可预测。
车道变化不会引入未建模的横向风险。

experiments.validation: Extensive simulations report average driving-cost improvements over constant-speed and regular eco-approach baselines.
experiments.baselines: 常速接近、普通生态接近、FIFO 策略和不允许超车的控制器。
experiments.metrics: 驾驶成本、能耗、延误、停车次数、超车次数和计算耗时。
experiments.ablation: 需比较禁用超车、禁用 DP 车道优化和不同滚动时域长度。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。
把综述分类映射到你的 scheduler、smoother、safety filter 和 evaluation 四层框架。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 信号场景与无信号 AIM 不完全一致。
超车可行性强依赖道路几何和混合交通行为。
DP 状态空间随车道数和车辆数增长。
extensions: 把“允许超车”转化为 JSSP 中可交换相邻作业的局部搜索。
在无信号交叉口中研究 FIFO relaxation 的安全边界。
联合学习车道选择和排序，避免两阶段失配。
critique.project_use: Supports the critique that FCFS/FIFO can be suboptimal and that speed smoothing should be coupled to sequencing.

interactive.response_zh: 放松越强，潜在效率越高，但规则复杂度和可解释性风险增加。
interactive.response_en: Stronger FIFO relaxation can improve efficiency but raises rule complexity.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
